text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Hurry up, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That dream again. I'm always chasing her in it. Every step I take is so
satisfying. So sweet. But...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It's just a dream now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a stir of excitement on the training course, and one runner is
at the center of it all.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
That's Narita Brian. She hasn't debuted yet, but just look at that
imposing demeanor.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I guess the rumors are true—she's challenging prizewinners to
unofficial races!

text_block_list.name: Senior Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
How about we set the distance to whatever you're best at? Which I'd
say is... 2,000 meters?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Can you offer a serious challenge at that distance?

text_block_list.name: Senior Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Sure, if it's against you. I'm the experienced runner here, so it's only
fair I give you a handicap. That's non-negotiable if I'm going to
accept this race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Fine, if you insist.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wooo! Hayahide, here! Over here! Brian's race is starting!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Ticket. The volume of your yelling is more than sufficient,
so would you kindly lower it?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa—how could I keep quiet?! Her opponent today is super strong!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Brian's a tough cookie, but if she fails big-time, she's gonna be
seriously bummed out!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: She will not.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm more acquainted with Brian's ability than anyone. I also know the
burden she bears because of it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (She's way ahead. Her hair and tail are waving in the wind...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(They say she races at the G1 level, so her talent is no fluke. Which
means I don't need... to hold back!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...There she is.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Waaagh! H-Hayahide! They're already past the last turn, but look at
the gap between them now...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes, Brian is far behind. Any normal runner wouldn't be able to make
up that distance...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But she is no normal runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud, thud, thud!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wh-what the heck?! That speed is crazy! She'll catch up at this rate!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Three lengths... Two lengths... Whoa, she's already in passing range!
Geez, this Brian's amazing!

text_block_list.name: Senior Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Agh... No way... I was in total control of this race! How can a
pre-debut rookie... possibly... catch up to me?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (You're strong, all right.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(So keep letting me chase you like this. Don't let me pass you just
yet.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (Show me all the fight that's in you. Maybe then...)

text_block_list.name: Senior Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (It always happens right here...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud, thud... thud... thud...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(How many times have I seen this moment—when the fire in their eyes
goes out, swallowed up by darkness? Too many to count...)

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian slowed down right before the finish... I guess she ran out
of stamina at the last moment.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Th-then the winner is...

text_block_list.name: Senior Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Wheeze, pant... wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Ah, there you are! What were you thinking accepting a race without
talking to me first?!

text_block_list.name: Senior Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I'm... s-sorry.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm impressed. She may be inexperienced, but beating her in a
2,000-meter race is no small feat! You did we—

text_block_list.name: Senior Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Stop, please. She's so much better than me, it wasn't even a real
race... at all!

text_block_list.name: Senior Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
That was no win! I should never... have gone up against a beast like
that!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... What's up with this mood? How come the winner isn't even a
little happy?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Because she saw it. When you experience an insurmountable power
up close, what you feel isn't excitement—it's fear.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
A beast who instills despair in everyone she faces... That's Narita
Brian—my sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race is over and an eerie silence falls over what was, seconds
before, an exciting competition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's rumored even amongst trainers that her talent is immeasurable.
That's why I came here today—to see it for myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But still, her race caught me off guard—both in how she stalled out
after that beautiful final sprint and the pained look on her face after.
choice_data_list:
Maybe I can figure her out if we talk
face-to-face.

Maybe I can figure her out if we talk
face-to-face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In my time here, no encounter has ever been as strange and confusing
as my first experience seeing Narita Brian.
